title: Lost Skeleton
description: A project about a new trader mob named Lost Skeleton
body:
**Lost skeleton mod ads a new mob called Lost Skeleton and a new unique mechanic**

 Idea by: catglaskin
 
 Model by: Gospi [https://modrinth.com/user/Gospi](https://modrinth.com/user/Gospi)
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af33ebb136dd7df2b210ff1fa83ae8dacbd56c9.png)

Lost Skeleton can be found in the Deep Dark biome and ancient cities, he has a unique look and
interface!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4d1BdoCX/images/92116ebaf70476c5df6106c42bd307b91e7d3816.jpeg)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4d1BdoCX/images/cde7a119cd3f4df11349a26c277883b87556b51e.jpeg)

You can trade a variety of things with him such as: sculk, bones, ores and many more!

Geckolib is needed [https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
